one_time_description: Treaty 6 Agricultural Assistance Claim settlement against the Government of Canada for $78,542,417, settled December 13, 2024 (subsequent event)
economic_notes: Member of Meadow Lake Tribal Council (nine nations). Portfolio investments in First Nations Bank, MLTC Resource Development LP, MLTC Program Services Inc, White Buffalo Development Corp, Accurate Industries Holdings Inc. Multiple large capital projects underway including water treatment plant ($9.66M budget), lagoon ($14.16M budget), subdivision ($10.51M budget), school remediation ($5.87M budget).
notes: Audit disclaimer of opinion issued due to serious deficiencies in accounting records and internal controls. Prior year comparative figures restated (Note 17) with significant corrections to restricted assets, funds held in trust, investment in MLTC RDI LP, deferred revenue, TCA, and accumulated surplus. Prior auditor also issued disclaimer. Budget information not disclosed (departure from PSA standards). Subsequent event: $78.5M Treaty 6 Agricultural Assistance Claim settlement announced December 2024. New accounting standards adopted in year: PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations and PS 3450 Financial Instruments. Consolidated entities include CMHC Housing Program and inactive Island Lake Development Corp. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($19,650,568) + CMHC ($350,401) + MLTC Program Services ($6,015,810) + Meadow Lake Health ($2,336,137) + Meadow Lake Child & Family ($338,611) - however MLTC and Meadow Lake entities may be tribal council/non-government; ISC-only used for isc_funding; osr calculated as total revenue minus ISC and CMHC only given uncertainty.
